mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry ( category, client_name, country_code, contact, email, country, artwork_title, artwork_size, artist_name, content, file_url, file_path, file_origin_name, agree_privacy, status, client_ip, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{category}, #{clientName}, #{countryCode}, #{contact}, #{email}, #{country}, #{artworkTitle}, #{artworkSize}, #{artistName}, #{content}, #{fileUrl}, #{filePath}, #{fileOriginName}, #{agreePrivacy}, 'PENDING', #{clientIp}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry WHERE client_ip = #{clientIp} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MINUTE)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry WHERE 1=1
AND client_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND contact LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND DATE(created_at) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(created_at) <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')

SELECT inquiry_id AS inquiryId, category, client_name AS clientName, country_code AS countryCode, contact, email, country, artwork_title AS artworkTitle, artwork_size AS artworkSize, artist_name AS artistName, content, file_url AS fileUrl, file_path AS filePath, file_origin_name AS fileOriginName, agree_privacy AS agreePrivacy, status, client_ip AS clientIp, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inquiry WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE inquiry_id = #{inquiryId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(login_date, '%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(login_date, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(login_date) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(login_date, '%m.%d') as dateStr, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM access_logs
WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 11 MONTH) WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 11 WEEK) WHERE login_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY dateStr ORDER BY dateStr ASC

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(created_at) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%m.%d') as dateStr, category, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM inquiry
WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 11 MONTH) WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 11 WEEK) WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 14 DAY)
GROUP BY dateStr, category ORDER BY dateStr ASC

SELECT country, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM inquiry
WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK) WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY country ORDER BY cnt DESC
